title: Software Engineer (L3)
description: Work on large-scale distributed systems and core search infrastructure.
criteria: CGPA > 8.5, Proficiency in C++, Java, or Go.

title: Azure Cloud Architect
description: Design and implement cloud solutions for enterprise customers using Azure.
criteria: CGPA > 8.0, Strong networking and virtualization knowledge.

title: Data Scientist I
description: Apply machine learning models to optimize logistics and delivery routes.
criteria: Strong Python and SQL skills. Experience with AWS is a plus.

title: Frontend Developer (React)
description: Build user-facing features for Microsoft Teams and Office 365.
criteria: Experience with React, TypeScript, and modern CSS frameworks.
